message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A window view showing a bouquet of flowers with pink and green tones in the foreground, with a turquoise sky visible through glass panes in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred window view where a bouquet of flowers with pink and green tones dissolves into vertical streaks in the foreground, while a turquoise sky visible through glass panes similarly smears into flowing bands of color; uneven color temperature shifts create a disorienting, dreamlike atmosphere where no elements hold sharp definition.
